mapper.select: SELECT p.price_id, m.number AS f_bzbm, p.f_bzmc, p.f_bzgg, d.name AS f_dw, p.f_yl, p.f_bz, p.f_tp, s.name AS f_bcfwgys, s.name AS f_cpgys, p.f_cty_base_property FROM t_sales_price_item_package p LEFT JOIN by_material m ON p.f_bzbm = m.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary d ON p.f_dw = d.kingdee AND d.category_name = '基本单位' LEFT JOIN supplier s ON p.f_bcfwgys = s.supplierid WHERE p.price_id = #{priceId};

select * from t_sales_price_item_package where f_bzbm in
#{code}
select * from t_sales_price_item_package where price_id = #{priceId} and f_bzbm = #{packageCode}
